team.name: Jack Carlsen
team.desc: Hi — I'm Jack, writer-director and the reason there's a duck in the logo. I work across live-action and 2D / 3D animation, usually chasing whatever daydream refuses to leave me alone. I started Rare Pond on a simple itch: build worlds escapist enough to disappear into, but honest enough that you spot a little of your own life once you're inside. LMU Film & TV grad, based in Los Angeles, and pretty much always mid-project. "Fishing in the pond for another catch of a story to tell" "swimming after an idea"

team.name: Karina Salerno
team.desc: Karina's the one who makes sure all our productions go swimmingly. In our pond, she's making sure every problem is solved before it happens. Making sure all our ducks are in a row, she's organizing people, locations, equipment, and so much more. If you can't find her she's probably nesting among a boatload of spreadsheets, stretching the last of our budget to the limits.
